problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: If Rhizobium inoculation for nitrogen fixation is applied to rapidly, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
